'''kokalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lymphanoid|lymphanoid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-k-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lymphanoid|lymphanoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kokalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kokalithi|kokalithi]] || [[word:kokaliji|kokaliji]] || [[word:kokalishi|kokalishi]] || [[word:kokaliki|kokaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kokaluthuthu|kokaluthuthu]] || [[word:kokalujuju|kokalujuju]] || [[word:kokalushushu|kokalushushu]] || [[word:kokalukuku|kokalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kokaluthu|kokaluthu]] || [[word:kokaluju|kokaluju]] || [[word:kokalushu|kokalushu]] || [[word:kokaluku|kokaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kokalufthuf|kokalufthuf]] || [[word:kokalufjuf|kokalufjuf]] || [[word:kokalufshuf|kokalufshuf]] || [[word:kokalufkuf|kokalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kokalethe|kokalethe]] || [[word:kokaleje|kokaleje]] || [[word:kokaleshe|kokaleshe]] || [[word:kokaleke|kokaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kokalothotho|kokalothotho]] || [[word:kokalojojo|kokalojojo]] || [[word:kokaloshosho|kokaloshosho]] || [[word:kokalokoko|kokalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kokalotho|kokalotho]] || [[word:kokalojo|kokalojo]] || [[word:kokalosho|kokalosho]] || [[word:kokaloko|kokaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kokalofthof|kokalofthof]] || [[word:kokalofjof|kokalofjof]] || [[word:kokalofshof|kokalofshof]] || [[word:kokalofkof|kokalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfthÃŸf|kokalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfjÃŸf|kokalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfshÃŸf|kokalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfkÃŸf|kokalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|kokalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|kokalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|kokalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|kokalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfthÃŸf|kokalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfjÃŸf|kokalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfshÃŸf|kokalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfkÃŸf|kokalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfthÃŸf|kokalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfjÃŸf|kokalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfshÃŸf|kokalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:kokalÃŸfkÃŸf|kokalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kokalÃḊthÃḊ|kokalÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:kokalÃḊjÃḊ|kokalÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:kokalÃḊshÃḊ|kokalÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:kokalÃḊkÃḊ|kokalÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kokalathatha|kokalathatha]] || [[word:kokalajaja|kokalajaja]] || [[word:kokalashasha|kokalashasha]] || [[word:kokalakaka|kokalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kokalatha|kokalatha]] || [[word:kokalaja|kokalaja]] || [[word:kokalasha|kokalasha]] || [[word:kokalaka|kokalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kokalafthaf|kokalafthaf]] || [[word:kokalafjaf|kokalafjaf]] || [[word:kokalafshaf|kokalafshaf]] || [[word:kokalafkaf|kokalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kokalasha|kokalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kokalshÃḋasha|kokalshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kokalroasha|kokalroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kokalmuasha|kokalmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kokalyaasha|kokalyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokokalnkshÃḋasha|gokokalnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokokalnkroasha|gokokalnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokokalnkmuasha|gokokalnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokokalnkyaasha|gokokalnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kokakalasha|kokakalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kokakalshÃḋasha|kokakalshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kokakalroasha|kokakalroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kokakalmuasha|kokakalmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kokakalyaasha|kokakalyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokokakalnkshÃḋasha|gokokakalnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokokakalnkroasha|gokokakalnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokokakalnkmuasha|gokokakalnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokokakalnkyaasha|gokokakalnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kekÃḊlasha|kekÃḊlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kekÃḊlshÃḋasha|kekÃḊlshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kekÃḊlroasha|kekÃḊlroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kekÃḊlmuasha|kekÃḊlmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kekÃḊlyaasha|kekÃḊlyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokekÃḊlnkshÃḋasha|gokekÃḊlnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokekÃḊlnkroasha|gokekÃḊlnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokekÃḊlnkmuasha|gokekÃḊlnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokekÃḊlnkyaasha|gokekÃḊlnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kokfalasha|kokfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kokfalshÃḋasha|kokfalshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kokfalroasha|kokfalroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kokfalmuasha|kokfalmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kokfalyaasha|kokfalyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokokfalnkshÃḋasha|gokokfalnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokokfalnkroasha|gokokfalnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokokfalnkmuasha|gokokfalnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokokfalnkyaasha|gokokfalnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
